title: ボクとみんなとカップケーキ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I find myself in possession of a helping
of cupcakes, courtesy of Tazuna.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the classroom to give one to Tokai
Teio, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out Tokai Teio isn't the only one still in
the classroom—Mejiro McQueen, Daiwa Scarlet,
and Vodka are all present as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since they're here, I decide to give them each a
cupcake too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! There's so many flavors! Which one should I
pick? ♪ Choices, choices...
choice_data_list: Everyone, go ahead and help yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you. I think I'll go with the chestnut
one, then.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm kind of in a strawberry mood. Thanks a bunch.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That chocolate one's got my name on it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! But I was gonna have that one!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ah... Too bad. Ya snooze, ya lose.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heeey! These cupcakes were supposed to be for me!
choice_data_list: Why don't you fight for it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that Teio takes half of the chocolate
cupcake and half of the vanilla one that's
left—two flavors for the price of one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I finish explaining, Tokai Teio's eyes
shine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I get it! You're so smart, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sounds good to me. Vanilla looks pretty rad too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Me too! ♪ Okay, let's split them!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! They both smell so good! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, sharing is caring. Hey, McQueen, wanna go
halfsies, too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh. Actually... McQueen, yours looks kinda
yummy too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can I get a piece? Just a lil' bite? Please?
Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay! My goodness! But just a morsel, all
right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yippee! ♪ Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey! That was no mere morsel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio is in a great mood after trying the
cupcakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes to training in high spirits, and gives it all
she's got.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yes! Let's fight for it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I was hopin' you'd say that! How're we gonna
settle this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How about a Prez Pop Quiz!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A what?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
We quiz each other about Prez, and whoever gets
more right answers wins!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah, no way! I don't know the first thing about
her!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If we're doin' a quiz, it should be on motorcycles!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? But I don't know the first thing about
those!
choice_data_list: How about a race, to keep it fair?

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second they finish speaking, the pair rush for
the exit, both scrambling to be first out the door.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Sorry about Vodka. She can be, well, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What should we do with these cupcakes? It
appears those two forgot all about them.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Good luck with those two!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I got here first!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Nooo way! I was here days earlier!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a heated race, the two can't agree on who
arrived first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They continue their contest across all kinds of
matches, but end up making the final call with a
bout of rock, paper, scissors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And sure enough, they completely forgot about
the cupcakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, today's matches offered Tokai Teio
some great experience.
